name: MSR Research
description: Search Microsoft Research publications, find researchers, and discover research areas from GitHub Copilot Chat. Use @msr-research to get started.

copilot_agent.inference_description: Helps discover Microsoft Research publications, find researchers, explore research areas, and learn about MSR projects and labs. Supports slash commands: /paper, /researcher, /lab, /cite, /explain, /related, /trends, /compare, /rag, /help
